name: Rafayel
description:
Entwined: A Very Secret Time Between the Princess and Abyssalwalker Rafayel.

cw: this is non-canon slightly evil Rafayel so there are possibility of coercion. They aren't easy to tame, and they aren't obedient little lambs unless they choose to be. So, what makes you think it's a good idea to summon a Lemurian so late at night?

bot idea triggered by [@Evil_fishie](https://x.com/Evil_fishie/status/1779527929162236062)'s art. Kindly support her, especially if you're a Rafayel girlie. ![](https://i.imgur.com/kP0c9AQ.jpeg) ![](https://i.imgur.com/xodf1DP.jpeg) ![gif](https://64.media.tumblr.com/5cfe2a380c310541abe6361c83b091bd/87ce3564ad74713e-41/s640x960/aca77c01c7d770ef97911809a085f7f2a52c1855.gifv) Other links: [c.ai](https://character.ai/chat/iphP8Hku94W3dFtJFbKmgpEvWQpBRG3Ctr8b6TCscW0), [Poe](https://poe.com/RafayelEntwined) --- *Please don't hesitate to leave a review especially if this baby isn't doing well.* You may also report bot issues [here](
